category_sources: source_facts.description says planus is an alternative compiler for FlatBuffers; the official repository describes Planus as a FlatBuffers compiler/tooling project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is planus; official repository branding uses Planus/planus.
docs_sources: The official GitHub repository README is the best available documentation surface for Planus.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe a FlatBuffers compiler implemented in the Rust ecosystem.
